name: studio.promote_staging
description: Promote an Actium Studio site's staging environment to production. Opt-in gated per work-r1-actium-studio-skills.md §1.1 — requires explicit operator confirm:true.
whenToUse: Operator explicitly approved cutting staging over to production after reviewing the staged changes.
Release-train flow: scripted promote after all CI + QA gates signal green and confirm:true is asserted by the caller.
Rollforward after a revert: promote a freshly-rebuilt staging environment to restore service.
whenNotToUse: No explicit confirm:true from the operator — promotion replaces production content and must not fire implicitly.
Staging environment has not been populated — pair with studio.get_staging_info first to confirm staging is current.
Caller wants to publish a single page — use studio.publish_page; promote_staging is a full-environment cutover.
